title: 7 Herbal Creams For Endometriosis
description: Vitex agnus-castus creams contains ursolic acid, aucubin, and rosmarinic acid, which are active constituents that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to the development and progression of endometriosis. The triterpenoids and iridoids in Vitex agnus-castus creams also have a regulatory effect on the hormonal balance, particularly in relation to estrogen levels, which can he...
